issues.description: PowerBoost with negative amount (-1000) is semantically incorrect for cost reduction. Should use a dedicated cost-reduction action or clarify that -1000 power ≠ -1 cost. Cost and power are distinct mechanics in OPTCG.

Second action KO target uses 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxCost filter, but the character to K.O. should be limited to those that NOW have cost 0 (after the -1 cost reduction). Current DSL does not enforce dependency: KO only targets those with cost ≤0 at resolution, not necessarily the same character reduced in action[0].
